text: Walking through these bright, empty corridors toward a space dedicated to research and development, I am filled with curiosity. The silence of the first room makes me feel both small and expectant, as if something meaningful is about to happen. In the next space, surrounded by bold colors and the energy of innovation, I feel inspired by the call to connect and evolve with intelligent machines. Amid sleek displays and creative messages, I sense both possibility and responsibility, an urge to question the future we are building.
